boundaries.visualEvidence: Figma node hierarchy, text, instances and simple extraction hints.
boundaries.transactionIntent: Inferred only from labels, frame names and visible validation/error text.
boundaries.blockTypes: All TaPaaS block types are candidates until confirmed against Glen's schema sample and the TaPaaS block catalogue.

textContent.name: Page label or transaction name
textContent.characters: Submit a notice of disposal for a vehicle

textContent.name: H2 heading
textContent.characters: Select the vehicle you sold to continue

textContent.name: Help text
textContent.characters: For example ABC123. Do not include spaces or special characters.

textContent.name: Input title
textContent.characters: NSW plate number or billing number

textContent.name: Help text
textContent.characters: Enter a plate number, for example ABC123, or 8 digit billing number on your renewal notice or Certificate of Registration.

textContent.name: We acknowledge the Traditional Custodians of NSW, and their continued connection to land, water and culture. We pay our respects to Elders past and present.
